title: Hit-and-hype raiding
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:HitandFade-TotC.jpg|thumb|right|250px|A-wing fighters carry out a hit-and-fade run against an Imperial ship.]]
'''Hit-and-hype raiding''' (also called '''hit-and-fade''') was a [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] slang term for '''hit-and-run raids''', a refinement of the operational doctrine of [[space denial]] that was used throughout the history of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] up to and beyond the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. The [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] later adopted an unconventional variation of hit-and-fade operations with [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyers]].

==Characteristics==
This tactic was extremely effective in harassing an enemy [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ship]] in conjunction with the [[Nova flare|Nova Flare]] strategy. This tactic prompted the ship's [[Captain/Legends|captain]] to launch their [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighters]], which took time to recover, delaying and even denying the capital ship the ability to pursue.

A downside to this strategy was that it was very demanding on the pilots undertaking these raids, as well as their [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]]. Prolonged use of this tactic was physically and mentally challenging, but as was the case during the [[Bacta War]], it ultimately proved to be worthwhile.

==History==
During the [[Bacta War]], ex-members of [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] developed the tactic of entering a system where a [[Bacta/Legends|bacta]] convoy was assembled, letting off a few torpedoes, then re-entering hyperspace. This was done in an attempt to force [[Ysanne Isard]] to allocate more resources to the defense of the bacta convoys, thus putting more strain on her ability to keep her monopoly on the [[Bacta Cartel/Legends|Bacta Cartel]].

In [[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]], [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]] employed [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyers]] in hit-and-fade operations to great effect during [[Thrawn campaign|his campaign]] against the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].

==Appearances==
*''[[X-Wing: The Bacta War]]'' {{Ab|X-Wing: The Bacta War (unabridged audiobook)}}
*''[[Heir to the Empire]]'' {{Ab|Heir to the Empire (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
